title: Parikh's Theorem and Context-Free Grammar Optimization
description: A flowchart illustrating the application of Parikh's Theorem to optimize the membership problem for context-free grammars by reducing it to a simpler problem over commutative semirings.
relationships: Input is processed by applying the theorem
Theorem transforms string into a numerical vector
Vector is checked against a predefined semilinear set
Set membership result determines original CFG membership
